name: Nantahala Pickleball
description: Nantahala Pickleball is a place to play pickleball in Bryson City, NC. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Amenities include restrooms, water, and food. The courts are free.

name: Swain County Recreation Park
description: Swain County Recreation Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Bryson City, NC. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are free.
